questionHtml: A person with Alzheimer’s disease typically has a reduced nucleus accumbens. Predict how this will affect the person.
markschemeHtml:
a. reduced cognitive function/processing/memory 

b. reduced reward/pleasure perception 

c. depression

OWTTE.
